title: BuildCraft Robotics
body:
The robotics submodule as provided by [BuildCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/buildcraft).

This submodule adds **Robots** - small, flying entities which can do various in-world tasks, controlled by Gates - such as planting trees, mining blocks, transporting items, harvesting, and more! It also adds blocks and items necessary for this functionality, such as the Docking Station, Zone Planner, Map Location and more.

Note that the [BuildCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/buildcraft) project contains the complete mod in single-JAR format - but not all versions are available in this format; likewise, not all versions are available in this multi-JAR submodule format.

Licensing information is provided in the full version's description above.
